basic_details.job_title: BSA Aligarh KGBV Recruitment 2026: 122 Vacancies for Principal, PGT & Other Posts – Apply by 20 July
basic_details.organization_name: Office of the District Basic Education Officer (BSA), Aligarh, under Samagra Shiksha, Uttar Pradesh
basic_details.post_name: Principal, PGT (multiple subjects), Lab Assistant, Office Superintendent/Clerk, Caretaker, Peon, Watchman, Cook
basic_details.job_type: Contractual (Service Agreement, 11 months 29 days per academic session)
basic_details.short_information: BSA Aligarh KGBV Recruitment 2026 notification has been released by the Office of the District Basic Education Officer (BSA), Aligarh, on 05-07-2026 for 122 contractual posts in 9 upgraded Kasturba Gandhi Awasiya Balika Vidyalaya (KGBV) schools of Aligarh district. Eligible candidates can submit applications only through Speed Post or Registered Post by 20-07-2026, up to 5:00 PM. This recruitment covers multiple posts, including Principal, PGT (various subjects), Lab Assistant, Office Superintendent/Clerk, Caretaker, Peon, Watchman, and Cook, under one notification.

important_dates.exam_date: Not Applicable (Merit and interview based selection)

application_fee.details: Not Announced Yet. The official notification does not mention any application fee for this recruitment.

age_limit.details: Principal: Minimum 30 years and maximum 45 years, as on 01 April of the selection year, along with at least 4 years of teaching experience in classes 9 to 12. All other posts: Minimum 25 years and maximum 45 years, as on 01 April of the selection year. Maximum age for service in Kasturba Gandhi Balika Vidyalaya is 60 years. | Age Relaxation: As per the reservation provisions prescribed by the State Government. | Character Eligibility: Persons dismissed from any service, or convicted of moral/character-related offences, or declared insolvent, are not eligible for selection.

qualification.details: Only female candidates will be selected for all 14 posts under this recruitment.

salary_details.details: Selected candidates will be paid a fixed monthly honorarium as per the post, ranging from Rs. 6,755 to Rs. 30,000. Employees receiving an honorarium of less than Rs. 15,000 will be covered under EPF/EPS, with a 12% employee contribution and 13% employer contribution deducted from the honorarium.

selection_process: Sl. No. Examination/Qualification Quality Marks Formula
1 High School Percentage of marks obtained x 10/100
2 Intermediate Percentage of marks obtained x 10/100
3 Graduate Degree Percentage of marks obtained x 20/100
4 Postgraduate Degree Percentage of marks obtained x 20/100
5 Teacher Training Percentage of marks in theory and practical exam x 30/100
Selection will be based on merit marks calculated as per the formula below
which will be selected through an interview.
If two or more candidates have equal quality marks
the candidate with a higher age will be ranked above in the merit list. If quality marks and age are both equal

candidates will be ranked as per the English alphabetical order of their names. All submitted certificates will be verified with the concerned board/institution at the time of selection. Honorarium payment will be made only after verification of documents.
The service agreement for teaching and non-teaching staff in KGBV schools will be for 11 months and 29 days per academic session. On satisfactory performance

a new contract for the next session may be made for another 11 months and 29 days after approval of the District Magistrate. Unsatisfactory service may lead to termination with one month's notice; serious misconduct or financial irregularity may lead to immediate termination and an FIR against the concerned person.
how_to_apply: Download the prescribed application form from the official website: https://aligarh.nic.in.
Fill in the application form neatly, without any cutting or overwriting; name, father's name, and date of birth must be written exactly as per the High School certificate.
Attach all required self-attested documents as listed above.
Clearly mention the applied post name and reservation category in bold letters on top of the envelope.
If applying for more than one post, submit a separate application form for each post via registered post, mentioning the post name, subject, and reservation category on each envelope.

Send the completed application only via Speed Post or Registered Post to: Office of the District Basic Education Officer, near Block Resource Centre, Lodha, Bimanagar, the lane opposite TVS Showroom, Sootmill Chauraha, Aligarh, UP – 202001.
Ensure the application reaches the office on or before 20-07-2026, 5:00 PM. Applications sent by ordinary post or courier will be rejected.
important_instructions: Applications will be accepted only via Speed Post or Registered Post; ordinary post and courier submissions will not be accepted. Incomplete, unclear, unsigned applications, or those without a photograph or required attachments, will be rejected. Applications received after the last date will not be accepted. Candidates applying for more than one post must send separate applications for each post. Only female candidates are eligible to apply for all posts under this recruitment. The Principal's subject-specific teaching duties will be handled by her, and a separate subject teacher will not be appointed for that subject. The number of vacancies may increase or decrease as per requirement. The office reserves the right to cancel this notification at any time; no court case will be maintainable regarding this right.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download BSA Aligarh KGBV Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF here

all_official_links.label: Download BSA Aligarh KGBV Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF here

content_sections.heading: What is BSA Aligarh KGBV Recruitment 2026?
content_sections.text: BSA Aligarh KGBV Recruitment 2026 is a contract-based hiring drive by the District Basic Education Officer, Aligarh, to fill 122 posts of Principal, PGT teachers, Lab Assistant, Clerk, Caretaker, and support staff in 9 upgraded Kasturba Gandhi Balika Vidyalayas. Only female candidates are eligible. Applications must reach the BSA office by 20-07-2026 via Speed Post/Registered Post only.

content_sections.heading: Quick Highlights
content_sections.text: Organization: Office of the District Basic Education Officer (BSA), Aligarh Post Names: Principal, PGT (Hindi, English, Maths, Biology, Chemistry, Physics, Computer Science), Lab Assistant, Office Superintendent/Clerk, Caretaker, Peon, Watchman, Cook Total Vacancies: 122 Apply Mode: Offline (Speed Post/Registered Post only) Notification Date: 05-07-2026 Last Date: 20-07-2026 (up to 5:00 PM) Eligibility: Female candidates only, post-wise qualification (see tables below) Age Limit: 25/30 to 45 years as on 01-04-2026 (post-wise, see below)

content_sections.heading: BSA Aligarh KGBV Notification PDF and Official Website
content_sections.text: This recruitment has been issued vide letter number Ji0Be0Shi0A0/2026-27, dated 05-07-2026, in line with the District Magistrate Aligarh's approval dated 03-07-2026. The notification, eligibility criteria, rules, and application form are available for download on the official Aligarh district website, https://aligarh.nic.in. Download BSA Aligarh KGBV Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF here

rows.office_of_the_district_basic_education_o: Principal, PGT (multiple subjects), Lab Assistant, Office Superintendent/Clerk, Caretaker, Peon, Watchman, Cook
Contractual (Service Agreement, 11 months 29 days per academic session)

rows.05_07_2026: Not Applicable (Merit and interview based selection)

content_sections.heading: BSA Aligarh KGBV Recruitment 2026 Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: A total of 122 posts are available across 9 upgraded Kasturba Gandhi Awasiya Balika Vidyalaya schools in Aligarh district: Dhanipur, Lodha, Tappal, Gangiri, Atrauli, Bijauli, Akrabad, Chandaus, and Jawan. Only female candidates are eligible to apply for all posts.

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Only female candidates will be selected for all 14 posts under this recruitment.

rows.minimum_qualification: Trained M.A. (Hindi/English) or M.Sc. (Physics/Chemistry/Zoology/Botany/Maths/Computer Science) from a recognized university, with at least 4 years teaching experience in classes 9 to 12, or at least 4 years' experience as Principal of a recognized Junior High School; candidate should not be less than 30 years of age. Alternative qualifications: 10 years teaching experience with First/Second class postgraduate degree along with training, in an accredited institution's Intermediate classes; or a training diploma in Education along with First/Second class postgraduate qualification, provided the candidate has completed 15 or 20 years of teaching service after obtaining the diploma, as applicable.
M.A . in Hindi with Sanskrit, or as per the Government Sanskrit College, Varanasi / Sampurnanand Sanskrit University, Varanasi examination equivalent.

Postgraduate degree in English from a recognized university as per rules, or Postgraduate Diploma with a Training/Diploma from an L.T. Training College or equivalent; candidates with a diploma/degree in Education will be preferred.
M.A. or M.Sc. in Maths, or a two-year B.Ed course including B.A. (Hons.)/B.Sc. (Hons.) in Maths.

M.Sc. in Botany/Zoology, or B.Sc. with Agricultural Botany and Zoology, or M.Sc. in Life Science from a UGC-recognized university/degree college, or a postgraduate diploma in Life Science from a university/degree college along with a B.Sc.

M.Sc. in Chemistry, or a two-year B.Ed (Hons.) course, or a postgraduate diploma in Biochemistry from a UGC-recognized university/degree college, or a postgraduate diploma in Chemistry along with a B.Sc.
M.Sc. in Physics, or a postgraduate diploma in Physics from a degree college's Education Department, Uttar Pradesh, along with a B.Sc.

B.E./B.Tech in Computer Science, MCA, M.Sc. Computer Science, "B" Level from DOEACC, Postgraduate Diploma in Computer Applications/Science, or an equivalent recognized degree/diploma with a computer science component as specified in the notification.
High School with Science subject and a Laboratory Technique Diploma, or Intermediate (Science) from a recognized board.

Intermediate examination pass conducted by the UP Madhyamik Shiksha Parishad or equivalent, along with Computer subject in High School/Intermediate, or a CCC certificate from NIELIT/recognized institution, or a computer science diploma/degree; minimum Hindi typing speed of 25 words/minute and English typing speed of 30 words/minute on computer.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Principal: Minimum 30 years and maximum 45 years, as on 01 April of the selection year, along with at least 4 years of teaching experience in classes 9 to 12. All other posts: Minimum 25 years and maximum 45 years, as on 01 April of the selection year. Maximum age for service in Kasturba Gandhi Balika Vidyalaya is 60 years. Age Relaxation: As per the reservation provisions prescribed by the State Government. Character Eligibility: Persons dismissed from any service, or convicted of moral/character-related offences, or declared insolvent, are not eligible for selection.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Honorarium
content_sections.text: Selected candidates will be paid a fixed monthly honorarium as per the post, ranging from Rs. 6,755 to Rs. 30,000. Employees receiving an honorarium of less than Rs. 15,000 will be covered under EPF/EPS, with a 12% employee contribution and 13% employer contribution deducted from the honorarium.

content_sections.heading: Application Fee
content_sections.text: Not Announced Yet. The official notification does not mention any application fee for this recruitment.

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection will be based on merit marks calculated as per the formula below, except for Cook, Assistant Cook, Peon, and Watchman posts, which will be selected through an interview. If two or more candidates have equal quality marks, the candidate with a higher age will be ranked above in the merit list. If quality marks and age are both equal, candidates will be ranked as per the English alphabetical order of their names. All submitted certificates will be verified with the concerned board/institution at the time of selection. Honorarium payment will be made only after verification of documents. The service agreement for teaching and non-teaching staff in KGBV schools will be for 11 months and 29 days per academic session. On satisfactory performance, a new contract for the next session may be made for another 11 months and 29 days after approval of the District Magistrate. Unsatisfactory service may lead to termination with one month's notice; serious misconduct or financial irregularity may lead to immediate termination and an FIR against the concerned person.

rows.quality_marks_formula: Percentage of marks in theory and practical exam x 30/100

content_sections.heading: Required Documents
content_sections.text: Duly filled application form (in the prescribed format only, no cutting/overwriting allowed) 2 recent self-attested colour photographs All educational mark sheets and certificates General residence certificate (Home district certificate) Caste certificate (for reserved category candidates) 2 character certificates issued by gazetted officers Aadhaar Card (mandatory) PAN Card, if applicable Other desired certificates (self-attested photocopies) 3 self-addressed envelopes with prescribed Speed Post/Registered Post postage stamps affixed

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Download the prescribed application form from the official website: https://aligarh.nic.in. Fill in the application form neatly, without any cutting or overwriting; name, father's name, and date of birth must be written exactly as per the High School certificate. Attach all required self-attested documents as listed above. Clearly mention the applied post name and reservation category in bold letters on top of the envelope. If applying for more than one post, submit a separate application form for each post via registered post, mentioning the post name, subject, and reservation category on each envelope. Send the completed application only via Speed Post or Registered Post to: Office of the District Basic Education Officer, near Block Resource Centre, Lodha, Bimanagar, the lane opposite TVS Showroom, Sootmill Chauraha, Aligarh, UP – 202001. Ensure the application reaches the office on or before 20-07-2026, 5:00 PM. Applications sent by ordinary post or courier will be rejected.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: Applications will be accepted only via Speed Post or Registered Post; ordinary post and courier submissions will not be accepted. Incomplete, unclear, unsigned applications, or those without a photograph or required attachments, will be rejected. Applications received after the last date will not be accepted. Candidates applying for more than one post must send separate applications for each post. Only female candidates are eligible to apply for all posts under this recruitment. The Principal's subject-specific teaching duties will be handled by her, and a separate subject teacher will not be appointed for that subject. The number of vacancies may increase or decrease as per requirement. The office reserves the right to cancel this notification at any time; no court case will be maintainable regarding this right.

faq.question: Q1. What is BSA Aligarh KGBV Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: It is a contract-based recruitment by the District Basic Education Officer, Aligarh, for 122 posts of Principal, PGT teachers, and support staff in 9 upgraded Kasturba Gandhi Balika Vidyalayas.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for BSA Aligarh KGBV Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application is 20-07-2026, up to 5:00 PM, via Speed Post or Registered Post only.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are there in this recruitment?
faq.answer: There are 122 total vacancies across 14 posts, including Principal, PGT (multiple subjects), Lab Assistant, Clerk, Caretaker, Peon, Watchman, and Cook.

faq.question: Q4. Who can apply for BSA Aligarh KGBV posts?
faq.answer: Only female candidates who are domiciled and meet the post-wise qualification and age criteria are eligible to apply.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: For Principal, the age limit is 30 to 45 years; for all other posts, it is 25 to 45 years, as on 01 April of the selection year.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary for Principal and PGT posts?
faq.answer: The Principal post carries a fixed monthly honorarium of Rs. 30,000, while PGT posts carry a fixed monthly honorarium of Rs. 22,000.

faq.question: Q7. Is there an application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Not Announced Yet. The official notification does not specify any application fee.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for BSA Aligarh KGBV Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Selection for teaching and administrative posts is based on quality/merit marks calculated from academic qualifications, while Cook, Assistant Cook, Peon, and Watchman posts are selected through an interview.

faq.question: Q9. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode is offline. Forms must be sent only via Speed Post or Registered Post to the BSA Aligarh office; ordinary post and courier submissions are not accepted.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I download the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The notification and application form are available on the official website: https://aligarh.nic.in.
